booking_rejected.title: Booking not accepted

booking_completed.title: Visit completed
booking_completed.body: Your visit ({service} on {date}) is marked as completed.

booking_cancelled.title: Booking cancelled
booking_cancelled.byPatient: A patient cancelled their booking for {service} on {date}.
booking_cancelled.byOther: Your booking for {service} on {date} was cancelled.

nurse_signup.body: {nurseName} just signed up and is awaiting approval.

nurse_rejected.title: Profile not approved
nurse_rejected.body: Your profile was not approved at this time. Please contact support for next steps.

order_created.title: New store order
order_created.body: A new order totaling {total} is awaiting review.
